title: Stage Girls
overview: The curtain rises on the performance of a lifetime as Karen and her classmates attend a prestigious music academy to become the next theatrical stars.

title: The Stage of Fate
overview: On the second day of the search for the next star, the girls accuse Karen of interfering with their auditions and not taking it as seriously as them.

title: Top Star
overview: Nana takes a role behind the scenes while Futaba notices that Claudine is bothered by something. Hikari is acting cold towards Karen, but is there a reason for it?

title: Promise Tower
overview: Hikari left campus, and Karen doesn’t understand why. Determined to find her friend, Karen searches for her throughout the city.

title: Is “Shine” Even Possible?
overview: Mahiru becomes increasingly dejected and jealous as Karen’s bond with Hikari strenghtens. Karen is spurred on with new determination, but where will this leave Mahiru?

title: Stage Left for Two
overview: Kaoruko fails to make the cut during class auditions and lashes out in indignation. Having earned a spot on stage, Futaba’s patience with Kaoruko reaches a boiling point.

title: Nana Daiba
overview: Nana Daiba’s memories of the acadamy’s 99th performance was a shining beacon crystalized in time. Can she ever move forward or will she be forever blinded by the past?

title: Toward the Light
overview: What’s past is prologue. The promise Hikari made with Karen is what fuels her determination, but life rarely occurs according to plan.

title: On the Night of the Star Festival
overview: Preparations for the next performance of Starlight continue, and everyone is filled with hope as they move forward. Everyone that is, except for Nana, who sinks into despair.

title: The Show Must Go On
overview: The final day has arrived and Karen and Hikari renew their vow to perform Starlight. Can they overcome the unforgiving audition and become Top Stars together?

title: We Are
overview: Fate is cruel and harshly deals with any deviation from the pre-established script. What happens to those who dare defy the system the day after the performance?

title: Revue Starlight
overview: Starlight is a story that always results in tragedy, but Karen rejects that doomed inevitability. Will she find a way to rewrite the ending before the curtain falls?
